name: mypilot
description: Gateway server for MyPilot - remote interaction console for Claude Code

scripts.restart:dev: npm run stop:dev && npm run dev
scripts.docker:up: LAN_IP=${LAN_IP:-$(node -e "const{networkInterfaces}=require('os');for(const[,a]of Object.entries(networkInterfaces()))for(const b of a)if(b.family==='IPv4'&&!b.internal&&b.address.startsWith('192.168.')){process.stdout.write(b.address);process.exit()}")} docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:restart: npm run docker:down && npm run docker:build && npm run docker:up
